items.text: Hi Priya, our Thursday chemistry lab will meet in Whitman Hall, Room 118, this week instead of the usual space, since the main lab is being recalibrated. Same time, 2:00 PM. Please bring your safety goggles and lab notebook. Thanks, Diego (TA)

questions.stem: According to the email, where will the lab meet this week?
questions.explanation: The email says the Thursday lab will meet in Whitman Hall, Room 118, this week instead of the usual space.

questions.stem: What can be inferred about the main lab this week?

options.C: It has moved to Whitman Hall
options.D: It is short on safety goggles

questions.explanation: Because the class is relocating while the main lab is being recalibrated, the main lab cannot be used for now.

items.text: Dear Sam, good news: your $15 equipment deposit from the Cycling Club trip has been approved for a refund. Please stop by the Student Activities Office in Benson Hall before Friday, April 24, to collect it, and bring your student ID. Best, Nadia

questions.stem: According to the email, how much will Sam be refunded?
questions.explanation: The email states that Sam's $15 equipment deposit has been approved for a refund.

questions.stem: According to the email, what must Sam do to collect the refund?

options.A: To mail a claim form to the club
options.B: To visit the Student Activities Office
options.C: To email the club treasurer directly
options.D: To sign up for the next club trip

questions.explanation: The email tells Sam to stop by the Student Activities Office in Benson Hall to collect the refund.
